name: Swiss Baked Scallops
recipeInstructions:
1. Place scallops in individual baking dishes.
2. Season with lemon juice, white pepper, celery salt, and melted butter.
3. Bake in a 350° oven for 15 minutes.
4. Remove from oven and pour off a portion of the excess butter and lemon juice.
5. Place slices of cheese on top of scallops.
6. Place under broiler until cheese bubbles.
7. Garnish with sprigs of parsley and a sprinkle of paprika.
